task_completion.description: Create a rectangular base plate with dimensions 100mm x 30mm x 3mm on the XY plane.
task_completion.visual_evidence: FreeCAD 3D view shows a flat rectangular box. The Combo View (tree view) should show a Box, Pad, or Cube object, and the property panel ideally shows dimensions 100mm (length), 30mm (width), and 3mm (height).

task_completion.description: Add 3D text reading 'ROBOT-01' using the specified DejaVuSans font with a 12mm height.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ROBOT-01' is visible in the 3D view. The tree view should show a ShapeString object. The property panel for the ShapeString should show the string 'ROBOT-01', height '12mm', and the font file path '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf'.

task_completion.description: Extrude the text 2mm above the base and center it on the top face.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'ROBOT-01' is 3D (extruded) and positioned centrally on top of the rectangular base plate in the 3D view. The tree view should show an Extrude operation applied to the text.

task_completion.description: Save the project as nameplate.FCStd in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar shows 'nameplate.FCStd', or a save dialog/file manager shows the file 'nameplate.FCStd' located in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

task_completion.description: Export the final geometry as an STL mesh named nameplate.stl.
task_completion.visual_evidence: An export dialog, recent files list, or file manager showing 'nameplate.stl' being saved to or existing in '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/'.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD GUI to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent clicking through FreeCAD menus, toolbars, and property panels rather than just executing a pre-written Python macro or terminal script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: The 3D model was built step-by-step rather than loaded from an external source.
integrity.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD tree view (Combo View) should show a history of operations (e.g., Box/Pad, ShapeString, Extrude) corresponding to the task steps, proving the model was constructed.

integrity.description: The agent used FreeCAD as requested.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application window clearly displays the FreeCAD UI, toolbars, and logo, not another 3D modeling software.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating a 3D nameplate in FreeCAD. The base plate must be 100x30x3 mm (Volume: 9000 mm³). The text must be 'ROBOT-01', font height 12mm, using the font file '/usr/share/fonts/truetype/dejavu/DejaVuSans.ttf'. The text must be extruded 2mm upwards (Total Z height: 5mm). The final files must be saved as '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/nameplate.FCStd' and exported as '/home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/nameplate.stl'.
